---
title: "Research Projects"
format: html
---

```{r, include=FALSE}

library(yaml)
library(dplyr)

projects <- yaml::read_yaml("data/projects.yml") |> bind_rows()

# Collapse accidental duplicates into a single project record
# and merge methods into one unique list.
projects <- projects |>
  group_by(title, theme, description, status, site, repo) |>
  summarise(
    methods = list(sort(unique(unlist(methods)))),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

status_badge <- function(status) {
  
  if (is.na(status)) return("")
  
  color <- switch(
    status,
    active = "#2980b9",       # blue
    completed = "#27ae60",    # green
    paused = "#7f8c8d",       # gray
    "#bdc3c7"
  )
  
  paste0(
    "<span class='status-badge' style='background:", color, ";'>",
    toupper(status),
    "</span>"
  )
}

```

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}

themes <- unique(projects$theme)

for (th in themes) {
  
  cat("## ", th, "\n\n", sep = "")
  
  subset <- projects[projects$theme == th, ]
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(subset))) {
    
    row <- subset[i, ]
    
    site_link <- if (!is.na(row$site)) {
      paste0("[Project Site](", row$site, ")")
    } else "Project Site"
    
    repo_link <- if (!is.na(row$repo)) {
      paste0(" | [GitHub](", row$repo, ")")
    } else " | GitHub"
    
    methods_text <- paste(row$methods[[1]], collapse = ", ")
    badge <- status_badge(row$status)
    
    anchor <- tolower(row$title)
    anchor <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "-", anchor)
    anchor <- gsub("(^-|-$)", "", anchor)
    
    cat(
      "### ", row$title, " ", badge, " {#", anchor, "}\n\n",
      row$description, "  \n\n",
      "**Methods:** ", methods_text, "  \n\n",
      site_link,
      repo_link,
      "\n\n",
      sep = ""
    )
  }
}
```
